title: Luxury watches, iPads and a Jaguar: what Peter Murrell bought with embezzled funds
description: Former SNP chief executive blew chunks of the stolen £400,310 on high-end watches, jewellery and coffee machines
content:
1. Cars
Murrell bought a luxury SUV – a Jaguar iPace – for £81,000, subsided with £57,500 stolen from the SNP money, which he later sold for £47,378, pocketing the proceeds. There was also a £124,550 Niesmann+Bischoff motorhome, which he parked on hi... [2305 chars]

title: Woman dies after being shot outside Sheffield bar
description: Three people are in custody after the 30-year-old was found with serious injuries early on Monday.
content:
The 30-year-old was found with serious injuries outside One Four One on West Street at about 02:45 BST on Monday.
She was treated at the scene by police officers and paramedics before being taken to hospital, where she later died.

title: Three arrested after 30-year-old woman shot dead in Sheffield city centre
description: Police launch murder investigation after incident in early hours of bank holiday Monday outside One Four One bar
content:
A 30-year-old woman has died after being shot outside a bar in a busy area in Sheffield city centre.
South Yorkshire police have launched a murder investigation after the incident in the early hours of this morning outside the One Four One bar on Wes... [1382 chars]

title: Rachel Reeves tells ministers to ‘buy British’ in four key industries
description: Exclusive: Chancellor pushes for procurement of ships, steel, energy and AI to prioritise Britishness as well as cost
content:
Rachel Reeves has instructed cabinet colleagues to award government contracts in four critical industries directly to British companies, making clear her irritation that ministers have been sending too much government business abroad.

content:
